info.description: This is a sample server with JWT authorization.
info.title: Go JWT Swagger Example API

post.description: Receive payment provider callback and finalize checkout
Processes the checkout of the authenticated user's cart.

delete.description: Deletes all products from the user's cart
Deletes given quantity of product by product_id and supplier_id from cart

get.description: Debug endpoint that simulates successful payment for an order

get.summary: List of contracts for the current user

post.description: Signing the contract (by client or supplier)

get.description: Retrieve notifications for the authenticated user

post.description: Mark all notifications as read for the authenticated user

get.description: Retrieve unread notifications count for the authenticated user

post.description: Mark a single notification as read for the authenticated user

get.description: Retrieves orders for the authenticated user using the provided JWT claims.

401.description: Unauthorized: invalid or missing JWT token

500.description: Internal server error while retrieving orders

post.description: Allows a customer to cancel their own order only if it's in Pending status.
Supplier updates the status of their order

get.description: Retrieves an order by its ID.

401.description: Unauthorized: invalid or missing JWT token

500.description: Internal server error while retrieving order

post.description: Create a new product. Admin access required.

put.description: Update an existing product. Admin access required.

delete.description: Delete an existing product. Admin access required.

get.description: Retrieve the authenticated user's favorite products
Retrieve a curated list of featured products
Retrieve a list of products with pagination support using limit and offset
Retrieve product search suggestions by query string
Retrieve product information by its ID
Check whether the product is in the authenticated user's favorites

post.description: Add the selected product to the authenticated user's favorites

delete.description: Remove the selected product from the authenticated user's favorites

post.description: Add a review for the selected product on behalf of the authenticated user

get.description: Retrieve address list for a user
Returns role ID for authenticated user
